MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:

Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Pia Harris is present.
Attorney Yin Zheng representing the defendant through limited scope.
Litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.
